CustomField.description: REMOVE THIS FIELD - AFTER FORECAST SETTINGS PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT
CustomField.formula: OR ( Product_Line__c = "APS", Product_Line__c = "ARS", Product_Line__c = "AWS", Product_Line__c = "CLH", Product_Line__c = "CLR", Product_Line__c = "DIS", Product_Line__c = "FAP", Product_Line__c = "HCS", Product_Line__c = "HTS", Product_Line__c = "IAS", Product_Line__c = "INV", Product_Line__c = "LVI", Product_Line__c = "MFT", Product_Line__c = "MLD", Product_Line__c = "MOL", Product_Line__c = "MOX", Product_Line__c = "NMO", Product_Line__c = "NVS", Product_Line__c = "PBR", Product_Line__c = "PGI", Product_Line__c = "QTS", Product_Line__c = "RRD", Product_Line__c = "RRS", Product_Line__c = "SPS", Product_Line__c = "TBR", Product_Line__c = "TIS", Product_Line__c = "TSC", Product_Line__c = "EZR",Product_Line__c="HCA",Product_Line__c="CVD",Product_Line__c="HBE",Product_Line__c="HBP",Product_Line__c="HCE",Product_Line__c="HDX",Product_Line__c="HOS",Product_Line__c="HRR",Product_Line__c="HZN" )
CustomField.label: Is LST Products?
